applicable.name: Consumer Protection from Unfair Trading Regulations 2008

citation.act: Consumer Protection from Unfair Trading Regulations 2008

website_obligations.duty: state material information about a property honestly and not mislead by omission
avoid aggressive or misleading pricing claims in listings
disclose referral fees and any financial interest to consumers
register the business for anti-money-laundering supervision
carry out customer due diligence before acting
publish the identity of the nominated officer where required

excluded.name: US state consumer-privacy statute (excluded: no US nexus)

artifact.text: we guarantee the lowest fees on the high street and are fully compliant, with no hidden charges

findings.description: no published customer due-diligence or supervision statement was found on the crawled pages
